qa_pairs.question: Where should User-Defined Function (UDF) files for Ansys Fluent be placed on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The UDF should be placed in the directory where your journal, cas and dat files reside.

qa_pairs.question: What is a crucial configuration check for Ansys Fluent users regarding User-Defined Functions (UDFs) before uploading a .cas file to Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Before uploading your cas file onto the Alliance please check that neither the Interpreted UDFs Dialog Box or the UDF Library Manager Dialog Box are configured to use any UDF; this will ensure that only the journal file commands are in control when jobs are submitted.

qa_pairs.question: How should a User-Defined Function (UDF) be integrated into an Ansys Fluent journal file on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: You should add one of the following commands into your journal file before the commands that read in your simulation cas/dat files.
